item.title: Beat me! | PWNME CTF 2023
item.description: Introduction du challenge : A pro player challenge you to a new game. He spent a huge amount of time on it, and did an extremely good score. Your goal is to beat him.. by any way If the game doesn't start, try an other nagivator Tree Viewer Les sources de ce challenge ne sont pas fournies. A première vue, ce challenge est un jeu ou nous devons battre l’utilisateur Eteck.
